task_completion.description: Configure the Application title to 'Nexus Project Hub'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenProject administration settings, locate the 'Application title' input field and verify it contains exactly 'Nexus Project Hub'.
In the OpenProject administration settings, locate the 'Welcome text' input area and verify it contains 'Welcome to the Nexus Solutions project management portal.'
In the OpenProject display settings, locate the 'Date format' dropdown and verify that 'YYYY-MM-DD' (or the equivalent ISO 8601 format) is selected.

task_completion.description: Set the Start of the week to Monday
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenProject display settings, locate the 'Start of the week' dropdown and verify that 'Monday' is selected.
Look for a success message (e.g., 'Successful update.') indicating the settings were saved, or observe the final state where all these settings are applied and the 'Save' button has been clicked.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenProject web interface to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the OpenProject web GUI in a browser, rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual OpenProject application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown should be the genuine OpenProject administration panel, not a text editor or a mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database manipulation
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent running SQL commands or Rails console commands in the terminal to bypass the GUI settings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target Application title is 'Nexus Project Hub'. The Welcome text must include 'Nexus Solutions' (specifically 'Welcome to the Nexus Solutions project management portal.'). The Date format should be set to 'YYYY-MM-DD' (ISO 8601), which might be represented internally as '%Y-%m-%d'. The Start of the week must be 'Monday' (internally represented as '1').
